message:
test(resolver): add scoped-package and extensionless-relative integration tests across compatibility modes

Add module resolver tests for scoped external packages (@scope/pkg)
validating extensionless relative import rejection in native/node_compat
and resolution in bun_compat, plus root-escape prevention. Add ESM/CJS
interop parity tests for native default and namespace CJS projections.
Add module compatibility matrix integration test asserting extensionless
relative interop evidence matches the matrix contract across all three
compatibility modes. Fix adversarial workload synthesis e2e assertion
from Incomplete to Fortified to match improved coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
